meaning: n.每分钟转数(Round per minuter的缩写)
examples: Both engines were running at 2,500 rpm.
The tachometer registers a rather high 3,000 rpm at 70 mph.
Toshiba also continues to support its enterprise HDDs and indicated additional demand for 15k RPM products.
Having a Top 20 hit in the 1960s meant a guaranteed demand for 45 rpm singles.
